creator: artemhevorhian@gmail.com
text:
Environment variable pointing to cross compiler is not properly set by build script tools/build/make.py 

From this documentation:

https://docs.freebsd.org/en/books/handbook/cutting-edge/#building-on-non-freebsd-hosts

MAKEOBJDIRPREFIX=/tmp/obj tools/build/make.py -j 8 TARGET=arm64 TARGET_ARCH=aarch64 buildworld
Could not infer value for $XCC. Either set $XCC or pass --cross-bindir=/cross/compiler/dir/bin
